notes: derive_recovery_commands included recovery commands from fully supported probes; fixed in 68bcf2862, with current-state re-audit finding no additional issues.
RESP3 empty and single-element Map/Set edge cases decoded without asserting consumed byte count; added full-consumption assertions.

Queue dry for pane5; added deterministic coverage for cancelled-reserve zero-delivery semantics. New test proves SendError::Cancelled returns the original value and both try_recv/recv observe Closed with no queued value. Proof: CARGO_HOME=/data/tmp/cargo_home_tealharbor_oneshot_cancel CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch_target_pane5_chan_local_oneshot_cancel_clean_home cargo test -p asupersync --lib mr2_cancelled_reserve_closes_receiver_without_delivery -- --nocapture passed.

Fresh-eyes audit: reviewed PostgreSQL auth-downgrade tests against current authenticate(), send_password(), and send_md5_password(); cleartext and MD5 auth fail closed before password-frame writes, and the audit asserts no peer-visible password bytes.
